name: Spinach Noodle Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons vegetable oil or melted butter
4 green onions with tops, finely minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles according to package directions until barely tender.
2. Rinse in cold water and drain.
3. Toss with oil.
4. In a large bowl, mix sour cream and flour.
5. Stir in remaining ingredients.
6. Add noodles and stir well to coat.
7. Pour into a well-greased Crock-Pot.
8. Cover and cook on High for 1 1/2 to 2 1/2 hours.
9. If desired, serve with additional sour cream.
